# Changelog

All notable changes to this project are documented here. The format follows
[Keep a Changelog](https://keepachangelog.com/), and the project aims to
adhere to [Semantic Versioning](https://semver.org/).

Entries are not edited here by hand: each change adds a fragment under
`changelog.d/`, and the release flow rolls the pending fragments into a new
version section below the marker (see `changelog.d/README.md`).

## Unreleased
